text:
#1998
Love, in a way, has the same fate as a cigarette.

You know the ending, but you still choose this way to suffer. Out of desire, out of habit. You light it up, watch the smoke curl, take a puff, and you inhale it, savoring the moment while the toxins slowly seep into your tongue and proceed towards the lungs, their destination.

With every exhale, you trade a moment of your lifespan, yet you do it gladly, because the moment of pleasure is greater than the unpredictable spiteful future.

Slowly, as these thoughts unwind, your cigarette comes to an end. All that is left are mere ashes. You watch them while rewinding the heavenly moment now gone.

Love comes, and we feel like our hearts are on fire. That longing, that adrenaline rush, the uncertainty of it, makes us burn inside. But we all enjoy it, don’t we?

We enjoy the moments-the hours of conversation, future planning, knowing each other, getting along so well like we are two sides of a coin, ignoring the inevitable truth that those times will fade like smoke leaving behind a scar no remedy can cure.

But what is even the future without the one we long for? So, despite the fights, chaos, complications, and so on, we hold onto each other for the sake of love. In the process, our love too comes to an end.

We think there’s still time, but it slips away and all that is left is memories, which we replay in our heads as we whisper to ourselves, 

 “Hold on and hope
that we’ll find our way 
back in the end.”

~anonymous

text:
#1996
Remember those nights when you lost me. You lost me in those little things. Me asking for time, care, a bit attention. But you never noticed those right? Cause those were too little to ask for. But that's all i wanted from you.

I loved you for all these years, but it was so worthless to you right? Me and my love was so worthless. All i wanted is to be with you, love you. I made you feel loved all the time but you didn’t treat me well. Now when I'm hurt and trying to be distant, you blame me that i didn't make you feel loved. It hurt me even more when you compare my love with your friend's relation as they are so happy, picture perfect. I'm so sorry I couldn’t love you properly. I'm so sorry to you. My heart bleeds. Still you tell me to stay with you. Why?  Let me go. You say that you won't be happy if i leave. But you don't fix the things that hurt me. These little things matter my love. I'm slowly fading away. And again,
Remember those nights when you lost me.

~anonymous

text:
#1995
2 days back my sister had a baby Alhamdulillah . But she wanted to have a normal delivery instead of c - section. So while she was having contractions she was screaming a lottttt and bhaiya could hear it from outside panicking what’s going on. After sometime she asked for him. The moment she saw him she started crying and they hugged each other and both were crying. Bhaiya also cried. Idk why for a moment out of nowhere your face came to my mind and I started thinking if I were in this position nobody could have taken care of me other than you. But reality hit hard quickly , you don’t want me. You’ve moved on . I also started crying. I was crying and helping her and was trying my best so that nobody sees me crying. Then when there was nobody I cried at the hospital in front of my mother making her as a shield. She asked me why I was crying like that , told her it was because of apuni. After that I continuously splashed water on my face so that I won’t cry anymore , but it just  didn’t stop . 
Why all on a sudden you came to my mind and why can’t I move on when you’ve moved on so easily ? Why ? Why ? Why ? 
While returning home , I tried my bestest not to cry. Then I went to have a shower , cried again like a baby with the shower on so that nobody could hear me. It hurts. Wanted to text you so badly , and wanted ask you : how can you sleep so soundly when I’m wide awake 
but couldn’t cause I know nothing will happen. If you’ve liked me you’d have taken actions already. But your silence says everything. It’s not like I don’t have any other options , trust me I do. If you’ve 10 , then Ive 100 . It’s just about choices. You chose to go for another person and I didn’t. 

~anonymous

এইযে কতদিন ধরে একটা ক্যাম্পাস অফ কারো কোনো মাথা ব্যাথা নাই,কতগুলো ছেলেমেয়ের ৪ বছরের যায়গায় ৬ বছর চলে যাচ্ছে তাও কারো মাথা ব্যাথা নেই,এই যে কারো মাথা ব্যাথা কেন নেই জানেন?  কারন কুয়েটিনরা সাধারণ মানুষের কথা ভেবে শান্তি পূর্ণ আন্দোলন করেছিলো।রাস্তা অবরোধ করে নি মানুষকে ভোগান্তিতে ফেলেনি।এই দেশে আঙুল বাঁকা না করলে কিছু পাওয়া যায় নাহ।কুয়েটিয়ানরা তাদের প্রাণের ১১৭ একরে ফিরতে চায়

text:
#1991
On behalf of the people in Gaza who are currently suffering, I know it won't be much, but to help them, we must stop using products like Coca-Cola, KFC, Bata, Sprite, Fanta, other Unilever products, or Nestlé, etc. But we are also greatly dependent on them. Again, we do have alternate products in our country, but they are not as good as the ones we import from American or Israeli companies. So I was thinking, since we all students are uniting together, why not all of us create one large company with the help of all the senior and junior students of our country to create our own products, so that we don’t have to depend on Israeli products?

I am not saying to build our own Unilever or Nestlé, because that would be foolish, but we can start small—like an alternative drinking water company. This means an alternative to Kinley, Aquafina, etc. We might already have alternatives for drinking water, but due to lack of availability and high production cost, we are getting humbled. So, with the help of all the students and teachers of all universities, schools, and colleges, if they help us with funding, we might be able to create an alternative company. And slowly, if it shows great results, we can take the next step by producing products like body lotion, soaps, shampoo, cosmetics, or snacks like chips, soda, chocolate bars, etc. This way, we won’t have to depend on Israel anymore.

Think about it—if all students in this protest start to build and sell their own products on campus, we can successfully replace Israeli products. And if all students just invest a minimum of 10 TK, it will be more than enough for us to create a company of our own. Soon, we will be able to replace any Israeli products.

It was my opinion, by the way. I hope we can start from KUET. If the seniors of KUET guide and help us, we might be able to do something for the people of Gaza this time.

~anonymous

text:
From the River to the Sea, Pal**tine Will Be Free

From the river’s banks to the endless sea,
A land of hope, of longing, and of plea.
Beneath the sky, the olive trees still grow,
Their roots in the soil where ancient rivers flow.

Through tear-streaked eyes, the children dream of peace,
A future where their suffering will cease.
The call for justice rises from the sand,
A steadfast wish, a voice across the land.

From every hill, from every humble street,
Pal**tine’s heart beats strong, and it won’t retreat.
Even if Ga*a is erased from the map,
The spirit of Pal**tine will never collapse.

Nature will rise, and Allah’s justice will come,
The devils of Isr**l will pay for what they’ve done.
Through fire and blood, through years of endless strife,
Pal**tine’s soul will endure, for it is life.

text:
#1981
মানুষ কখন হতাশ হয় জানেন? যখন মানুষ কিছু এক্সপেক্ট করে এবং সেটা সে না পায়। আমার পর্যবেক্ষণে আমি হতাশ হবার পেছনে কেবল এই একটাই কারণ খুজে পাই। হতাশায় পড়েও যে কিছু শেখা যায়, নিজের মধ্যে থাকা ভুলগুলো সংশোধন করা যায়, তা আমি এবারের ভ্যাকেশন থেকে শিখেছি। 
ক্যাম্পাসে আমি যাদের আপন ভাবতাম বা আপন করে নেয়ার চেষ্টা করতাম, সত্যি বলতে তারা আমার জীবনে আপন করে নেবার মতন কেউ নয়৷ ক্যাম্পাসে আমার এক কাছের বন্ধু এটা বলতো, "এই ১০১ একরে ম্যাটেরিয়ালেস্টিক লাইফ ছাড়া তুমি আর কিছু পাবে না।" কয়েক দিনের এই ক্যাম্পাস জীবনে আমি যেটা খেয়াল করতাম, আমি সবার কাছে ততক্ষণই আপন, যতক্ষণ আমার ভেতর তার জন্য বেনিফিট কিছু বিদ্যমান। এর পর ছুড়ে ফেলে দেয়া। এই বিষয়গুলো এতটাই স্বাভাবিক যে, হয়তো আমার লেখা এপ্রুভ নাও হতে পারে। হয়তো ভাববে 'এ আর নতুন কি!'। কিন্তু আমি এসব লিখছি আমার ক্যাম্পাসের অনুজদের জন্য। তবে সব অনুজদের জন্য নয়! যারা আমার মতো ইনট্রোভার্ট, সহজ-সরল; তাদেরই জন্য। এ দুটো গুণ/ দোষ যার বা যাদের মধ্যে আছে, তারাই কেবল নিচের টুকু পড়ো। 

দ্যাখো, যেহেতু তুমি ইন্ট্রোভার্ট, বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ে এসে তোমার অন্য সকলের মতো বন্ধু-বান্ধব তেমন হবে না৷ তখন তুমি চাইবে বন্ধু বানাতে এবং সবার সাথে সমভাবে মিশবে। এতে করে তোমার যে একটা সেল্ভ ভ্যালু ছিলো, সেটাও দেখবে কমে যাচ্ছে। একসময় তোমার আউটপুট ঘুরে-ফিরে শূন্য। তাই বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ে এসে নিজের যে একটা মোশন ছিলো, সেটা ধরে রাখবে। 

"সত্যি বলতে, বিশ্ববিদ্যালয় জীবন স্মুথলি কাটিয়ে দেয়ার জন্য না খুব বেশি বন্ধুর দরকার হয় না।" এটাও আমার সেই বন্ধুরই কথা। যেহেতু তুমি ইন্ট্রোভার্ট, তোমার মাইন্ডসেট অনুযায়ী তুমি কাউকে না কাউকে পেয়ে যাবে এখানে। তাদের সাথে কম্ফোর্ট জোন তৈরী করে নিবে। 

প্রোডাক্টিভ মানুষ হতে চাইলে আমি বলবো অন্যদের মতো ফেসবুকে শিট পোস্টিং করবে না। "আমাদেরকে যদি সরকার আদেশ দিতো যে, আমরা দৈনিক কি করি, কোথায় যাই, কার সাথে কথা বলি; এসব কিছুর একটা তালিকা তৈরী করে দৈনিক সরকারের কাছে জমা দিতে, আমরা কি কখনো রাজি হবো? কখনোই না। কিন্তু আমরা কি সহজেই নিজের ব্যাক্তিগত তথ্য সোস্যাল মিডিয়ায় আপলোড করে দিচ্ছি! কার কাছে দিচ্ছি, তা আমরা নিজেরাও জানি না।" সোহাগ ভাই এর এই কথাটা অনেকেই শুনেছো! নিজেকে একটুখানি রহস্যময় করে রাখতে এই ব্যাপারটা মাথায় রাখবে। 

এসব কথা আমার নিজ জায়গা থেকে তোমাদোরকে বললাম। কারণ তুমি পিছিয়ে পড়বে, অবশ্যই তুমি পিছিয়ে পড়বে, যদি তুমি হতাশ হয়ে পড়ো। হতাশ না হয়ে স্কিলড হবে। এটাই ছিলো লেখকের আকাঙ্খা। 

~পুরকৌশল'২৩ থেকে আমি বলছি।

text:
#1978
To my beloved,
Im a fool. To think I could match my words with how i feel. To even try to express what I see,  You.
The grace of a shrine maiden, flowing like the summer breeze. That gentleness in your eyes could calm a raging storm.
Voice soft as a whispering Sheuli petal, yet it echoes in my heart. O how I felt, seeing You for the first time, Moonlight making a ripple on still water, dilating time itself. Looking at your eyes was a fatality and Im fallen ever since. 
Yet I never got the courage to say anything. 
My beloved, Im a fool. The weight on my chest making its hard to breathe , yet I wont dare to interfere with something so gentle, so precious and delicate, You.
As one could have several versions of himself on others mind, I wonder, how I resides in your world, maybe as a monster, could be non-existent. well, that's fine. Meeting the expectation of a goddess is beyond my reach. Though,  I wish. I wish the possible timeline I dreamt of would collide with this world, causing the unexpected, Paradox where I can hold your hands. Where I can make you smile for the rest of my life, have you as mine.
My beloved, I wish I weren't a fool. Wish I were blind...

~Anonymous f

text:
#1977
Imagine if Phoebe and Joey stopped talking. Now that's how I feel. Then again, there were never a Joey and Phoebe; it was all in my head. Sometimes I think if you ever saw me as a friend. I lost a precious friend. I want to hate you but our friendship was so precious to me that I cannot bring myself to hate you. The one most important thing in my life was friendship and I never even imagined that you would stop being my friend; at least not you. I lost my last and best platonic friendship when we walked away from each other. Yet I had dreams that we remain friends until we die. Take care, my friend. 

All these lost friendships have made lots of holes in my mind. Why can't we simply remain friends with people? Why do we have to drift apart? 

~anonymous

text:
#1969
1st April 2024 — I didn’t notice the date.
When he said he met his ex again and told me so many things, I couldn’t take it.
When I finally saw the date, I still tried to believe it was just an April Fool’s joke.
Because neither is he going back to his ex—though he loves her a lot, she has someone newNor is he coming to me. Instead, he behaved badly with me and told me not to talk to him.I was... lost.
The day passed.So many things happened.We had gone into a relationship. We loved each other.A very beautiful story.
He was broken by his ex, and we fixed everything together.

1st April 2025 —
We don’t talk.He loves someone else now.They’re in a relationship—making moments, meeting...
And me?
I am gifted that 1st April,2024 situation of his..I’m left with the memory of 1st April 2024, the day he poured out his broken story.
A heartbreak story of 9 months for me. He managed to set up everything in just 6 months.
But what about me?
Every day, I’m drowning... deeper and deeper.

~A broken heart moving closer to death,
not with noise,
but with the quiet surrender
of someone who once believed
love could save.

Emergency post:

পঞ্চানন কাকাকে হয়তো আপনারা চিনে থাকবেন।যিনি কুয়েটের জন্মলগ্ন থেকে কুয়েটে বিভিন্ন হলের সামনে বসতেন জুতা নিয়ে।উনার বয়স প্রায় ৮০।এই বয়সে এসেও তাকে তার সংসার চালানো লাগছে।কিন্তু কুয়েট  বন্ধ হয়ে যাওয়ায় গত ২ মাস যাবত তার আয়ের উৎসও বন্ধ।তারই সাথে তিনি অনেক আগে থেকেই অসুস্থ। তো গত কিছুদিন আগে কিছু সাহায্যের জন্য আমাকে তিনি কল করেন।আমি কিছু ব্যাচমেট থেকে এবং আমার থেকে মিলিয়ে মাত্র ৭০০ টাকা দিতে পেরেছিলাম শুধুমাত্র ডাক্তার দেখানোর জন্য।এখন তাকে ডাক্তার প্রায় ৩ টা টেস্ট এবং ঔষধ খেতে বলেছেন এবং টেস্টের রিপোর্ট ১ সপ্তাহের মধ্যে দেখাতে।ইতিমধ্যে কিছু দিন পার হয়ে গিয়েছে কিন্তু তার কোনো টেস্ট ই সম্পন্ন হয় নি।সাথে ঔষধ কেনার টাকা ম্যানেজ করতে পারছেন না। এবস্থায় তিনি আজকে আমাকে কল করেন গ্রামের আরেকজনের মাধ্যমে যে তার আগামী রবিবারের মধ্যে টেস্ট গুলা প্রয়োজন। তাই তার ইমারজেন্সি সহযোগিতা প্রয়োজন। এবং অই লোক আমাকে বলেছেন তার টিবি  হবার সম্ভাবনা রয়েছে। তাই কুয়েটিয়ান সকলের সহযোগিতা কামনা করছি।

text:
#1953
ক্যাম্পাসে ফেরার টিকিট কাটার পর থেকেই মনটা ভীষণ ভারী। আবার ফিরতে হবে সেই জীবনের যুদ্ধে। চোখ বন্ধ করলেই নিজের বর্তমান আর অতীত শিক্ষাজীবনের ছবি ভেসে ওঠে।
মধ্যবিত্ত পরিবারের ছোট ছেলে হিসেবেই বেড়ে ওঠা আমার। যদিও আল্লাহর রহমতে আর্থিকভাবে এখন বেশ ভালো আছি। বড় ভাই এক নামকরা বিশ্ববিদ্যালয় থেকে পড়াশোনা করে এখন সরকারি চাকরি করছে। নিজের চোখে ভাইকে কান্না করতে দেখেছি—ভর্তি পরীক্ষার ফরম তুলবে, কিন্তু টাকা নেই।
যাই হোক, আরেকটু সামনে আসি। ক্লাস টু থেকে থ্রিতে উঠলাম, রোল হলো আঠারো। প্রতিবেশী, আত্মীয়স্বজন সবাই বলাবলি শুরু করল—"এই বড় ভাইয়ের মতো হবে না।" এদের কথা দূরেই রাখলাম, কিন্তু আব্বুই ক’দিন পরপর বলা শুরু করতেন—"অমুকের এক ছেলে সরকারি চাকরি করে, আরেক ছেলে তার ভাইয়ের বাড়িতে কাজ করে খায়, এর অবস্থাও এমন হবে।"" হয়তো কথাগুলো আমার ভালোর জন্যই বলতেন, কিন্তু আমার খুব কষ্ট লাগত। তখন "ডিপ্রেশন" শব্দটার সাথে পরিচিত থাকলে বলতে পারতাম, আমি ডিপ্রেশনে ছিলাম।
ক্লাস ফোরে রোল হলো দুই, ফাইভে এক। যথাযথভাবে আত্মীয়রা পূর্বের কথা ভুলে আমার গুণগান শুরু করল। ক্লাস এইট পর্যন্ত এভাবেই চলল।
ক্লাস নাইনে বড় এক স্কুলে ভর্তি হলাম। বাসা থেকে একটু দূরে হওয়ায় ক্লাস করা হতোই না বলা চলে। বছর শেষে রোল দাঁড়াল চুরাশি। আবার চারদিক থেকে মকিং শুরু হলো। ক্লাস টেনে বেশ ভালো করেই পড়াশোনা করলাম। এসএসসির কিছুদিন আগে এক স্যার আব্বুকে বললেন—"চেষ্টা করলে প্লাস পেতে পারে, কিন্তু গোল্ডেন হবে না।" এটা নিয়ে আব্বুর কাছ থেকে বেশ কথা শুনতে হলো।
রেজাল্টের দিন সকাল থেকেই আব্বু বলতে লাগলেন—"রেজাল্ট দিলো? কয় সাবজেক্টে ফেল?" দুপুরে রেজাল্ট এলো—গোল্ডেন পেয়েছি।
কলেজ জীবন শুরু হলো, ভালোভাবে শেষও হলো, পড়াশোনা নিয়ে কোনো কথা শুনতে হয়নি। এরপর শুরু হলো অ্যাডমিশন জার্নি। শহরে নতুন, কোনো রেস্ট্রিকশন নেই। যে আমি কখনো মাগরিবের পর বাইরে থাকিনি, সেই আমি রাত ১-২টা পর্যন্ত বাইরে ঘুরতাম। পড়াশোনা একদম করতাম না বললেই চলে।
MIST ভর্তি পরীক্ষা দিলাম কোনো প্রস্তুতি ছাড়াই। প্রথম মেরিটে আসল না, বাসায় আবার মকিং শুরু হলো। এরপর দ্বিতীয়, তৃতীয় মেরিট কল যেদিন আসত, সেদিনই ফোন দিয়ে জিজ্ঞেস করত। যখন বলতাম আসেনি, তখন আবার কথা শুনতে হতো। চতুর্থ মেরিটে নাম এলো। আমি খুশি হয়ে বাসায় ফোন দিলাম। উত্তর এলো—"চতুর্থ মেরিটে নাম আসায় এত খুশি হওয়ার কী আছে?"
একটু পড়াশোনায় সিরিয়াস হলাম। ভার্সিটি অ্যাডমিশন গুলোতে সিলি মিসটেক করায় চান্স হলো, কিন্তু মেরিট দূরে। রাবি, গুচ্ছ ভার্সিটিতে ভালো মেরিট আসলেও পরিবারকে খুশি করতে পারলাম না, কারণ ঢাবিতে হয়নি। বুয়েটে প্রিলিতে হলো, রিটেনে হলো না। হলে প্যানিক অ্যাটাক খেয়ে পরীক্ষাটা ভালো দিতে পারলাম না।বুয়েট রেজাল্টের দিনটা ছিল জীবনের সবচেয়ে বিভীষিকাময় দিনের একটি। অবশেষে ভর্তি হলাম কুয়েটে।
১-১ পুরোটাই গেল সিনিয়রদের র‍্যাগিং আর বুয়েটে না হওয়ার চিন্তায়। ফলস্বরূপ, রেজাল্ট খারাপ করে বসলাম। ১-২ বেশ ভালো করেই আগাচ্ছিলাম, সিটিগুলোও ভালোই গিয়েছিল।PL শুরু হতেই পড়াশোনায় মনোযোগ হারিয়ে ফেললাম। এরপরেও কষ্ট করে পড়াশোনা করে পরীক্ষায় গেলাম। আগের দিনে পড়ে আসা অনেক কিছুই কমন ছিল, কিন্তু লিখতে গেলেই পারতাম না। এভাবেই সব পরীক্ষায় দেখি—পড়ে আসা সহজ টপিকগুলো লিখতে পারছি না।রেজাল্ট ১-১ এর থেকেও খারাপ করলাম। বাসা থেকে প্রতিদিন ফোন দিয়ে রেজাল্ট জানতে চায়। নানা তালবাহানা করে বলি—"রেজাল্ট পেছানো হয়েছে।"
২-১ এও মোটিভেশন হারাইনি। চালিয়ে গেলাম, ভালোভাবেই যাচ্ছিল। আন্দোলন + ঈদের ছুটি মিলিয়ে বন্ধ প্রায় ৫০ দিন। একটা দিনও বই-খাতা ধরতে পারলাম না। পুরো সেমিস্টারে যা পড়েছি, সব ভুলে গেছি।
যে আমি ঘণ্টার পর ঘণ্টা বসে পড়তাম, সেই আমি এখন দুই ঘণ্টা বসে পড়তে পারি না। প্রেমজীবনের ব্যর্থতা তো আছেই, সঙ্গে একাডেমিক ব্যর্থতা তিলে তিলে শেষ করে দিচ্ছে।

কয় সাবজেক্টে ফেল?" দুপুরে রেজাল্ট এলো—গোল্ডেন পেয়েছি। কলেজ জীবন শুরু হলো, ভালোভাবে শেষও হলো, পড়াশোনা নিয়ে কোনো কথা শুনতে হয়নি। এরপর শুরু হলো অ্যাডমিশন জার্নি। শহরে নতুন, কোনো রেস্ট্রিকশন নেই। যে আমি কখনো মাগরিবের পর বাইরে থাকিনি, সেই আমি রাত ১-২টা পর্যন্ত বাইরে ঘুরতাম। পড়াশোনা একদম করতাম না বললেই চলে। MIST ভর্তি পরীক্ষা দিলাম কোনো প্রস্তুতি ছাড়াই। প্রথম মেরিটে আসল না, বাসায় আবার মকিং শুরু হলো। এরপর দ্বিতীয়, তৃতীয় মেরিট কল যেদিন আসত, সেদিনই ফোন দিয়ে জিজ্ঞেস করত। যখন বলতাম আসেনি, তখন আবার কথা শুনতে হতো। চতুর্থ মেরিটে নাম এলো। আমি খুশি হয়ে বাসায় ফোন দিলাম। উত্তর এলো—"চতুর্থ মেরিটে নাম আসায় এত খুশি হওয়ার কী আছে?" একটু পড়াশোনায় সিরিয়াস হলাম। ভার্সিটি অ্যাডমিশন গুলোতে সিলি মিসটেক করায় চান্স হলো, কিন্তু মেরিট দূরে। রাবি, গুচ্ছ ভার্সিটিতে ভালো মেরিট আসলেও পরিবারকে খুশি করতে পারলাম না, কারণ ঢাবিতে হয়নি। বুয়েটে প্রিলিতে হলো, রিটেনে হলো না। হলে প্যানিক অ্যাটাক খেয়ে পরীক্ষাটা ভালো দিতে পারলাম না।বুয়েট রেজাল্টের দিনটা ছিল জীবনের সবচেয়ে বিভীষিকাময় দিনের একটি। অবশেষে ভর্তি হলাম কুয়েটে। ১-১ পুরোটাই গেল সিনিয়রদের র‍্যাগিং আর বুয়েটে না হওয়ার চিন্তায়। ফলস্বরূপ, রেজাল্ট খারাপ করে বসলাম। ১-২ বেশ ভালো করেই আগাচ্ছিলাম, সিটিগুলোও ভালোই গিয়েছিল।PL শুরু হতেই পড়াশোনায় মনোযোগ হারিয়ে ফেললাম। এরপরেও কষ্ট করে পড়াশোনা করে পরীক্ষায় গেলাম। আগের দিনে পড়ে আসা অনেক কিছুই কমন ছিল, কিন্তু লিখতে গেলেই পারতাম না। এভাবেই সব পরীক্ষায় দেখি—পড়ে আসা সহজ টপিকগুলো লিখতে পারছি না।রেজাল্ট ১-১ এর থেকেও খারাপ করলাম। বাসা থেকে প্রতিদিন ফোন দিয়ে রেজাল্ট জানতে চায়। নানা তালবাহানা করে বলি—"রেজাল্ট পেছানো হয়েছে।" ২-১ এও মোটিভেশন হারাইনি। চালিয়ে গেলাম, ভালোভাবেই যাচ্ছিল। আন্দোলন + ঈদের ছুটি মিলিয়ে বন্ধ প্রায় ৫০ দিন। একটা দিনও বই-খাতা ধরতে পারলাম না। পুরো সেমিস্টারে যা পড়েছি, সব ভুলে গেছি। যে আমি ঘণ্টার পর ঘণ্টা বসে পড়তাম, সেই আমি এখন দুই ঘণ্টা বসে পড়তে পারি না। প্রেমজীবনের ব্যর্থতা তো আছেই, সঙ্গে একাডেমিক ব্যর্থতা তিলে তিলে শেষ করে দিচ্ছে।

text:
#1947
Sometimes, I really wonder if you miss me or not—if I ever cross your mind. And if I do, then why don’t you reach out? Because I’m not going to knock on your door anymore, no matter what happens. I want to move on because you’ve moved on.

I still remember the day when I couldn’t even breathe, the first time I had a panic attack—that rainy night. How can I forget that day? But the real question is, how did you move on so easily? And why can’t I? Why am I still stuck with these memories of the past? Isn’t it unfair?

You made me feel loved, and then you vanished. You say it was never love. Then why did you say those words? Why did we talk for hours? Why did you tell me that my voice made you feel better? Was it all a lie? How can someone be this fake?

You never gave me a reason. You just disappeared.

I miss the old me—the one who loved herself more than anyone, who was confident in herself. Now, I kind of hate myself because I can’t bring myself to hate you. And still... I miss you.

~Anonymous

text:
#1938
Struggle with Faith 

Since childhood I have struggled with my faith, surprisingly it's not because of my obsession with science from an young age. 

For some reason I have always been able to separate science from religion, and for me religion was never about being right, or proving that ""I am right about the world, and you are wrong."" It has always been about teachings of religion, virtue, community, faith in something bigger and above all Hope. 

But around mid '10s I began to learn about the cruelties of the world, the wars, the famines, malnourished children and so much more... The first thing that really shook my faith was the War in Yemen... Those children... You can't convince me that there is any justifiable reason for God to allow that to happen to children whose only fault was being born in the wrong place at the wrong time... You may want give some explaintion but no need, I have heard them all and find none of them convincing. People don't even talk about Yemen anymore... Because of Palestine I know, and what's happening there is heartbreaking all the same! Also to an smaller scale Sudan, also West Africa, also Guatemala..... I can go on and on!

People really want to right, and prove others wrong don't they... People don't even want to treat people of other faiths like... people... The amount of bigoted things I have heard from good people in every other regard about people of different faith is sickening!

People think being tolerant of other faiths is a virtue... Can you imagine that, treating people like people is a virtue in todays world!

I know what this seems like, me blaming God for the sins of humanity, to a certain extent it is. What I  struggle with is how can you be all powerful and benevolent, and allow this to go on!  Is this your greatest creation? Human Beings? Nothing happens without your permission so Why do you will this cruelty to continue!

Don't get me wrong I don't hate God or religion. I hate people who weaponize people faith to divide, discriminate, and hurt people for their own gain and I guess there are just too many people like that!

(Not part of the post: To the admin I understand if you don't want to post this as it's a very touchy subject, I just needed a place to vent without being called names, and thank you(plural) for creating that space!)

~anonymous

text:
#1935
The love that makes sense—the one rooted in compatibility, shared values, and a smooth rhythm—feels safe and enduring. It’s the kind of love that builds a strong foundation, one where you can grow together without constant turbulence.

Then there’s the love that makes no sense—the one that shakes your soul, defies logic, and sometimes even disrupts your life. It’s intoxicating, unpredictable, and often fleeting, yet it leaves an imprint so deep that it lingers even when it’s gone.

If you're lucky, you might find both in one person—but if not, you have to decide what your heart can live with and what it can live without.Which one should we choose?

~anonymous

text:
#1926
Whenever I see the person at peace with that present for whom I am "EX", I glance at the mirror—only to face the ruin I’ve become. Once nurtured by my mother’s care, now frail, eyes sunken, hair falling, sickness clinging to me. Time slips away, yet I remain stuck.

I tell myself to focus—on my career, my parents' happiness—but no matter how hard I try, I fail. Helplessness consumes me, followed by panic, breathlessness.

If leaving was inevitable, why was I first broken? Did anyone ever grasp this agony?

Why was I chosen just to be left in ruins?

Once, I was strong, driven—a fighter. Now, I am lost, weak, aimless. But does any of it even matter? And can a mere "sorry" ever fix it? 

So many will say that one day, I’ll laugh at my own words. But will my career ever be fixed? Will the damage ever be undone? Or is it already too late? Because truth be told, I’ve lost too much already.

~Someone who can't but always keep dreaming death, not to be in peace, just, can't take anymore.

text:
#1904
Fading into the abyss

You move through the world like a beam of light, never hesitating, never faltering. And I? I exist in the abyss, in the spaces between your moments, in the silence that lingers when you walk away. I don’t know if you ever thought of me, if I ever brushed against your thoughts, but I, oh, I have drowned in you.

There are things that belong to the light, and things that are meant to fade. Some exist to be seen, to be held, to be part of a story. Others remain unseen, drifting at the edges, watching, waiting for a moment that will never come.

So now, I am trying to dissolve into the shadows where I have always belonged, to let the abyss take me. To erase every part of me that ever reached for you.
But even as I sink, something of me lingers, a whisper in the wind, a flicker in the dark.

The presence that never mattered.

~Random pages from Cinderella's Diary

So now, I am trying to dissolve into the shadows where I have always belonged, to let the abyss take me. To erase every part of me that ever reached for you. But even as I sink, something of me lingers, a whisper in the wind, a flicker in the dark.  The presence that never mattered.

text:
#1901
Reply to #1891

How much can one person really handle? A bond can only survive if both sides put in effort. If someone keeps pushing the other person away, keeps blaming them, keeps hurting them , even when that person has done nothing but try to understand, how does that work? 
Maybe that person did try to hold on, over and over again. Maybe they silently took all the pain, tried to be patient, and tried to stay. But for how long? They’re human too, they have their own life, academic pressure, family. The biggest thing, their own heart that can break like yours.
Before feeling like you’ve been left alone, maybe look back and see how hard that person tried to stay, how much they sacrificed just to not lose you. But if you keep saying they're the reason for your problems, stop talking, push them away, keep shutting them out. what else are they supposed to do? Beg you to stay?
You can’t expect something from someone that you’re not willing to give. If one person is always trying to understand, always holding on, but the other person doesn’t even try.
How is that fair?
Maybe now that person just wants you to hold on, try to understand, put your ego aside and talk,  just show a little effort to stay with them.
Maybe they just want you to know they’ve always been there for you, and they still want to be. They never wanted to leave you alone.
You just have to hold on to them and that will be enough.

( Ageo ekbar likhechi, Admin please ebar approve koren, ami apnar jonno doa korbo)

~anonymous

text:
#1900
I find myself in a dark reality right now—probably darker than anything I've ever known. Let me share it because I know you will be shocked.

First of all, being a good guy from an early age always comes with a fatal backlash. How? Because others keep grinding down your self-worth every day, comparing you to your past. For a moment, let's put my guards down, accept their words, and take them as true. But why did this situation occur? The answer is obvious—addiction. I won’t go into details, but addiction is not just bad; it’s the worst thing one can be attached to. It sears into you, inflicting pain every moment without you even realizing it.

Second, what happens when you try to be good again and stay away from it? Your body shivers until you give in. Your mind is beaten down by relentless thoughts—pleasure and prudence clashing like titans. Your heart races uncontrollably, spiraling into chaos. And despite denying every bit of reality, the addiction keeps rubbing out your own susceptibility and consciousness. My mind is filled with desperate wishes, eerie whispers, and endless ushers of longing.

Oh Lord, how can I break free from this filth? These burning, heavy shackles of pain and guilt suppress the very core of my soul, turning me into a wandering madman.

Yet, you people keep judging me. Now, I don’t think I can come back. So I’m telling you—whatever you do, stay away. Stay aloof from those puffs, peeks, tries, and taunts.

~A Scarlet Reminder

বাসার পাশেই একটি মাদ্রাসা, আসার পর থেকেই প্রতিদিন সেহরির সময় ঘুম ভাঙে তাদের মধুর কোরআন তিলাওয়াতের শব্দে। কত অপূর্ব সেই ধ্বনি! মনে হয়, যেন আকাশ বাতাস ভরে যাচ্ছে পবিত্রতার ছোঁয়ায়।

আর বিকেলের দিকে? তখনও এক অন্য রকম সৌন্দর্য—তাদের গাওয়া সুরেলা গজল। এখন এই মুহূর্তেও যখন লিখছি, তখন কানে ভাসছে, "ও মেরা নবি, মেরা নবি"—কী অপরূপ সে সুর! রমজানের এই পরিবেশ, এই আত্মার প্রশান্তি সত্যিই এক অন্য রকম অনুভূতি এনে দেয়।

কিন্তু শুনেছি, কাল মাদ্রাসায় ছুটি হয়ে যাবে। ভাবতেই কেমন যেন খালি খালি লাগছে! রমজান মাসের এই প্রশান্তিময় মুহূর্তগুলো খুব মিস করবো। আমরা এই মাসে যে হেদায়েত পাই, সেই নূরের আলো যেন সারা বছর আমাদের জীবনকে আলোকিত করে রাখে। আল্লাহ আমাদের সেই তাওফিক দান করুন। আমিন।

~anonymous

কৃষ্ণবর্ণের এক সহপাঠী 28 অক্টোবর ক্লাস শুরু হওয়ার পর থেকে কোনো পুরুষ বন্ধুর সহিত ছবি যুক্ত করে বার্থডে উইশ করতে দেখলাম না ।। কিন্তু ওই কৃষ্ণবর্ণ বন্ধু সব সময় রমণীদের সহিত ছবি যুক্ত করে উইশ করে ।। আমার ওই সহপাঠির বন্ধুত্ব সব মেয়েদের সাথে।। ওর চলাফেরা ছেলেদের মত হলেও শ্বেত বর্ণ  ধারী বন্ধুদের মনে সন্ধিহান ও হচ্ছে ইচ্ছাধারি ছেলে ।। তা না হলে এত ছেলে থাকতে কেন মেয়েরা ওর কাছে কমফোর্টেবল ফিল করে।।

~ তড়িৎ 10111

Peeps and my fellow friends, I would like to remind you that from today, the holiest 10 nights of the year begin. Among these nights, there is one that is better than a thousand months—the night when the Quran was revealed. Whoever prays on this night will have their sins forgiven.

Although there are a few signs mentioned in Hadith to identify this night, like rain, calm weather, and a bright sky, it’s better to try and pray on all the nights of the last 10 days of Ramadan.

So let’s try our best to utilize these nights and get benefited as much as possible, in sha'Allah.

Please keep me in your prayers, and as my brothers and sisters, you're always in mine.

~anonymous

text:
#1877
I never thought you could say something like that. Never, not even in my wildest dreams.

You were the first and only safe place in my life where I could breathe, where I could let my guard down and just be me. I trusted you with everything..the things I never dared to say out loud, the wounds I never let anyone see. But thank you... thank you for making me realize that I should never share anything with anyone, not even if I'm breaking, not even if I’m drowning.

Thank you for teaching me that no matter how much I crave for happiness or peace, I should never chase them. That no matter how thirsty I am for warmth, I should never reach for it. Because in the end, everything comes back to haunt me. People never forget. They never let you forget. They’ll always remind you of your mistakes, throw your past at you like knives, even when you’re already bleeding.

So, thank you for that realization that I don’t deserve happiness. That I don’t deserve care. That I don’t deserve love.

Thank you for the traumas that will never leave me, for the scars that will burn a hundred times stronger than before. Thank you for adding more insecurities to the ones I was already drowning in. Thank you for every beautiful memories...

I’m sorry for everything. I shouldn’t have come into your life and ruin it. I never planned for it trust me! Please forgive me if you can. We should’ve never met. I should’ve never come close to you.

Please, if you can, forgive me. I really am sorry. I promise I won’t bother you ever again.

I’ll always remember you. I’ll remember how you once helped me heal, only to shatter me all over again.

~anonymous

text:
#1873
I still have a heart that beats - a heart that resonates with what I perceive. It bleeds when I witness injustice, compelling me to act.

I was born a fool. I wish I had a brain with a few more IQ points - one that could prioritize, one that could think rationally instead of always following my heart and instincts.

As injustices shake me, I act - even when silence might have kept my life stable. I find myself dragged into problems, trying to solve them, but often resisting. My incompetence and lack of intellect only result in near zero contributions. To achieve a mentionable contribution, I need to put a whole lot of time than others.

It’s been 30 days since the campus closed. I watch my batchmates pushing themselves to learn new skills; some are gearing up for research. They’re making the most of their time.

Meanwhile, here I am - stuck on something, clinging to imaginary others who don’t even care about their own rights. I’ve ruined everything - my present, my future.

Though I’ll stick with it, that’s just me. I can’t control myself.

I do wish for a stable life - to make my parents proud, to keep my family happy, to be a dad who can fulfill all his children’s wishes. But deep down, I don’t think my stars will allow it.

~anonymous

Hello, ei group er post pore toh ami sure KUET takes away all your peace and sanity. But let me tell you how it took away my boyfriend. Me and my boyfriend were dating each other since the first year of college. We both went to the same college. Admission season er por, I got into DU IBA and he got into KUET, and he was very salty about it and the LDR we would have. Jak classes start holo and he left for Khulna. I started teaching at my local coaching center. Toh ektu time management issue hoto and we sometimes didn't get to talk. I was an utter mess. Ja hok, fast forward two months later, I find out he was cheating on me with a apu from KUET. So ladies be careful before you send off your boyfriend to KUET. Also to that apu, ei chele age r thakei week e at least tin din shower nei na.

~Anonymous

All these posts took me back a few years ago, when I made one of the worst mistakes of my life. Time is cruel and doesn't let you go back and undo your actions. Nothing is worth losing a woman you love.

সে অনেক আগের কথা। সদ্য যৌবনে পা দিয়েছি, তেলিগাতীর কুয়েট ইউনিভার্সিটির এক রাঙা চামড়ার ছেলের প্রেমে হাবুডুবু খাচ্ছি। মনে হচ্ছিল, এই তো জীবন সুন্দর!

হঠাৎ একদিন তাহার মাতা বক্রদৃষ্টিতে আমাকে দেখে বলিলেন,

— "মেয়ে মন্দ নয়, কিন্তু রঙটা একটু... মলিন।"

শুনে আমি জীবনের সব দুঃখ ভুলে খুলনার কুকুরের বাবু মারা রোদ্রকে দায়ী করলাম। কিন্তু বিধি বাম— প্রেম হারিয়ে গেল, আর আমি হয়ে গেলাম এক ব্যর্থ সানস্ক্রিন ব্র্যান্ডের পোস্টার গার্ল।

তাই বলি, বেশি বেশি রোদ প্রতিরোধক ব্যবহার করুন— নইলে প্রেমের সঙ্গে গায়ের রঙও ফিকে হয়ে যেতে পারে!

~anonymous

text:
#1857
We are trapped in the prison of this world, constantly chasing success while unknowingly drifting away from the afterlife  —an undeniable truth. But if you take just two minutes to think calmly, you’ll realize that many of us aren’t even achieving what is considered "success" in this life, nor are we preparing for the afterlife. So, what exactly are we doing? We neither put in enough effort to succeed in this temporary world nor take the necessary steps for our eternal hereafter. Then what are we truly caught up in? Just take a moment—pause, reflect, and ask yourself: What are you really doing with your life? It may not be relatable to everyone, but I believe many will find themselves in these words.

~another overthinker from 23

text:
#1851
To #1842,

Honestly... I never meant to hurt you. I didn't mean to make you feel like you weren't important to me. God, looking back now, I can see exactly how I did it though. How I just... pulled away without even noticing. Making excuses instead of really listening when you needed me most.Those late night talks we used to have? Where we'd talk about absolutely everything and nothing at the same time? I miss that so much. I miss your voice. The way you'd always say goodnight, and I'd say it back... like this little thing we had. I would actually wait for your calls. I would get excited seeing your name pop up on my phone. But somewhere along the way, I just... stopped trying. Got too comfortable. Thought you'd always be there no matter what.
When you brought up that stuff about priorities, I just brushed it off. Didn't even try to understand what you were really saying. Now when I read your messages from back then, I can see how much you were hurting. You were giving everything while I just took and took. Never even stopped to ask if you were okay. You needed reassurance, and I completely failed you there.
Then when you finally ended things... I was just lost. Part of me couldn't believe it was real, like maybe you'd change your mind. But deep down? I knew it was coming. I pushed you to that point. Had to have seen it coming. You were just protecting yourself from someone who wasn't fully showing up. But in that moment? I couldn't even react right. I felt numb at first, but then it hit me like a truck.
I keep replaying all these moments in my head. Your texts. Those voice messages you'd send. Waking up to see your name on my phone first thing. God, I miss it. Miss you. Those mornings waiting for your call... all those stupid little jokes that only we understood. It's like it all vanished overnight, and I didn't realize what I had until it was gone.
I want to reach out so badly. Just tell you I'm sorry. That I finally get it now - I understand how much I hurt you. But... would that even help? Would you even want to hear from me? You blocked me everywhere, and honestly, maybe that was the right call. Maybe you needed that clean break to heal. But I don't know how to move on either. I just... miss you. Miss us.
I wish I could go back and do things differently. Notice all those little signs. All the ways you tried to show me you cared. I wish I'd cared more when it mattered. Now all I've got is this... emptiness. This feeling that I lost something irreplaceable. And I don't know if I can ever fix it.

~anonymous

text:
#1843
হাই, ১৮৩৬ থেকে বলছি। আজকে একটা পিনিক কাহিনী কই। 

আমার গফের কানদার স্বভাব এখনো সামহাও যায়নাই। হুদ্দাই মাইয়াডা কানদে। আমার এখন অভ্যাস হয়ে গেসে যদিও। মজাই লাগে ওরে টিজ করতে। তো ঐদিন দুপুর বেলা আংকেল কল দিসে। দিয়ে বলতেসে "বাবা, আমার মেয়েটা যে এতো নরম স্বভাবের তুমি তো জানোই। আমি আর তোমার আন্টি তো অফিসেই থাকি। একা থাকে মেয়েটা সারাদিন। তোমার সাথে থাকলে তাও ঠিক থাকে। তাই আমি বলি কি ওকে নিয়ে একটু বের হইও। তোমারও তো আরও অনেকদিন বন্ধ বাকি।"

মনে মনে কইলাম গুয়াডা মারসে। তারাবির পর একটা বিড়ি খামু সেই ট্যাকাই পাইনা, আবার নাকি নবাবজাদীর সাথে মোলাকাত করতে ডেইলি গুলশান যাওয়া লাগবে। তাও কইলাম যে হ্যাঁ আংকেল সমস্যা নাই, টেনশন কইরেন না। আমি আছি তো। এসব বইলা ফোনটা রাইখা দিলাম আর নিজের কপাল বাইরাইতে শুরু করলাম যে বন্ধুদের কথা শুনতে হয়। এরপর রেডি হইতে গেলাম যে গফের সাথে ইফতারের প্ল্যান আজকে। হঠাৎ দেখি কই থেইকা কেডায় জানি ৫০০০ বিকাশ করসে। আব্বুরে ফোন দিয়া উঠতে পারিনাই, তখনই আংকেল আবার কল দিয়ে বলতেসে, "বাবা অল্প কিছু টাকা দিসি। তুমি তো আমার ছেলের মতোই। যাও দুজন ঘুরে-ফিরে খেয়ে দেয়ে আসো আজকে।" আমি তো নগদে কাইন্দা দেই যে ইনি তো ফেরেশতা। তাও একটু নাটক কইরা কল রাখসি পরে। 

এবার আসি আসল ক্লাইম্যাক্সে। গেসি yum cha তে। দুইজন বইসা গপ্প মারতেসি। একটু পরেই আজান পরবে। কয়েক টেবিল দূরে হঠাৎ এক বেডির উপর আমার চোখ পড়লো। ওমা ঐ কিরে, এ তো দেখি আমার গফের আম্মা। তাও আবার আরেক বেডার লগে এক্সডি। আমি দেইখাও না দেখার মতো কইরা ফালাইসি। বড়লোকেরা এডি করে বইলাই জানি যেহেতু। ২ মিনিট পর আন্টিই আমারে ইশারা দিয়া ডাকলো। আচ্ছা গেলাম ভালো কথা। 

আমারে কিসব ভুজুং-ভাজুং কইতাসে। আমি তো বুঝছি যে ক্যাচালে পইরা গেসে। আমিই আগ বাড়ায় কইলাম, আন্টি সমস্যা নাই। আমরা খেয়েই উঠে বেরিয়ে যাচ্ছি। বেডির উপর থেইকা মনে হইলো পাহাড় সইরা গেসে। এরপর আমারে জিগায়, "বাবা পেমেন্ট করেছো?" বললাম না আন্টি, খেয়ে করবো। বিশ্বাস করবেন না কাকা, নগদে ৩০০০ ট্যাকা ধরায় দিয়া কয় আন্টির তরফ থেকে আজকের ট্রিট। এরপর একটু তাল্টিবাল্টি করলাম কিন্তু ট্যাকা টা আন্টি নিলোনা। আমিও আইসা পরলাম আর বইসা বইসা রিয়েলাইজ করলাম যে, জীবনে বন্ধুদের উপদেশ কোনদিন আসলেই মানতে হয়না।

~anonymous

text:
#1842
After everything that happened that day in KUET Whispers, I realized I had to make a decision—even if it was based on made-up replies. I remember sitting in my room, scrolling through our messages, feeling this heavy weight in my chest. At 1:13 AM, I decided to message her. I just had to get everything off my mind.

We started talking about our daily routines like nothing had changed. But when I asked her about the made-up posts in KUET Whispers, her reply made it seem like she didn’t even care. It felt like I was talking to someone else.

I tried to make her see things from my perspective, tried to help her understand how I felt, but it was clear she wasn’t listening. When I brought up priorities, she brushed it off like it didn’t even matter. And she wouldn’t admit where she was wrong. That’s when I realized—I couldn’t keep doing this. I couldn’t keep being the only one trying. So, I made the decision. I broke up with her, but honestly, I don’t think she even cared.

It’s been two days since then, and I still can’t shake the feeling. Moving on isn’t as easy as I thought. Every time I send a message on WhatsApp and see those grey checkmarks instead of green, it hits me all over again. I keep thinking about all the little things—the good nights we’d text every single day, the morning calls I always waited for. I miss her voice, her jokes, even the silly arguments. I miss when she’d tease me over the smallest things, like when I didn’t like her Instagram story. Those moments meant everything to me, but now they feel so far away.

I don’t even know if I did the right thing by blocking her on everything. I still want to hear her voice, to feel like maybe things could’ve worked out. But then I remind myself why I did it—to stop the cycle of hurt. I miss her sweet words every night, the ones that made me feel like everything was okay. And now, I’m just left with this emptiness, not knowing how to move on. She’s changed, like she’s a completely different person now.

I didn’t want to tell anyone about this, but I needed to get it out. Maybe in the future, I’ll look back at this and laugh, but right now, it feels like I’ve lost something that truly mattered to me. I’m just trying to make sense of it all. It’s tough, but I guess it’s part of growing up.

~ The guy from the deleted #1816

Lately I've realised every single unplanned memory I've made in my 20s is going to be an absolute gold in the future. 

So, 
Execute that tour plan you made with your friends. I mean you should ofc save some money but spend that mighty money if needed. Go to that coffee shop you've always wanted to go. Experience that game you once thought giving it a chance. Because you're not going to get back this energy neither these people. 

.
Carpe diem, my boys! 
SEIZE THE DAY. 

~The Riot Rhetoric.

#1836
আমার ব্রেকাপ হইসিলো ২০২৩ এর মাঝের দিকে কুয়েটে আসার কয়েক মাস আগে আরকি। বেশ ব্রোকেন ফেইজে আসিলাম। তো সদ্য বানানো বন্ধু-বান্ধব খালি গুতায় যে এমন কইরা থাকস কেন। একদিন বইলাই বসলাম যে এই কাহিনি। সবাই খুবই হতাশ। তো এখন আমার মন ভালো করাইতে পূজার বন্ধের পরের চাঁদ রাইতে বলল যে আমার দুঃখ ভুলাইতে সবাই আসর বসাবে। যেই কথা সেই কাজ। রোজ-রোল সব রেডি। ২ ঘণ্টা পর আমরা সবাই মহাকাশে। গান বাজতেসে "চলে গেছ তাতে কি, ভালোবেসে মরেছি।" হেব্বি একটা ভাইব সবার।

এখন এরপর আমার আর কিচ্ছু মনে নাই। উঠসি সকালে। সকালে উইঠা দেখি আমার এক্স এর আগের এক্সের ৫০টা মেসেজ। আমি তো অবাক যে এই বেডি মেসেজ দিসে কেন। এডার লগে আবার আমি নিজেই ব্রেকাপ করসিলাম। কিছু হইলেই কানতো। রাগলেও কানতো, খুশি হইলেও কানতো, ভালো না লাগলেও কানতো। যাই হোক। এরপর আমি চ্যাটে ঢুইকা যা দেখসি কাকারা বিশ্বাস করেন, আমি প্রস্তুত আসিলাম না। আমি নেশায় রাতের বেলা ভুল এক্সরে মেসেজ দিয়া কাইন্ডা কাইট্টা প্যাচ-আপ করসি। মাইয়াও আবার লেখসে "আমি জানতাম, তুমি আমারে ভালোবাসছিলা। আমি এখন তোমার মতো চলবো। যা বলবা তাই করবো।" 

আমি তো ভায়া এখন চিন্তায় বাচিনা যে এহন কি করন যায়। কারণ ঐ মাইয়ার তো নতুন বফ হইসিল। চ্যাট পইরা দেখি আমি ব্যাক করতে চাইসি দেইখা মাইয়া ঐ রাতেই ওর বফ এর সাথে ব্রেকাপ করসে এই বইলা যে ওর বাসা থেইকা আমার সাথে ওর বিয়া ঠিক করসে। তাই এখন আর প্রেম করতে পারবেনা। সেই সকালে আমি যেই খিচটা খাইসিলাম, লগ খায়াও এমন লাগেনাই। ভাই-ব্রাদার সবাই কইলো মামা এই মাইয়ার লগে যাইস না। আমিও রাজি হইলাম যে না রিস্ক আসে। এখন আমরা সফলভাবে দেড় বছর ধরে আবার প্রেম করতেসি। সবাই দোয়া কইরেন।

~anonymous

text:
#1835
Reply to #1834,

I get why you’re feeling this way, and it’s completely okay to have these thoughts. The past can leave an impact on people, but that doesn’t mean he’s still emotionally attached or that you don’t matter to him. Instead of overthinking, try to have an open and calm conversation with him, let him know how his words make you feel, not in a confrontational way, but so he understands. If he truly cares about you, he’ll make an effort to reassure you. At the same time, focus on his actions rather than just his words about the past. If he’s with you now, it’s because he wants to be, and as long as he’s making you feel valued and secure, try not to let old memories overshadow what’s real between you two. But if his actions ever make you feel like you’re competing with a memory instead of being his priority, then it’s okay to reflect on whether the relationship is giving you the happiness and security you deserve. Relationships grow through understanding and patience, so trust in what you have and communicate openly because you are important, and you should always feel that way.

~anonymous

text:
#1831
অনেক স্বপ্ন আর এক্সপেকটেশনস নিয়ে কুয়েটে এসেছিলাম....একাডেমিক এক্সিলেন্সির থেকে লাইফ ইঞ্জয় করা,সুন্দর সুন্দর এক্সপিরিয়েন্স গেইন করার প্রত্যাশাটাই ছিল বেশি।যাহোক,দেড় বছরের মাথায় একটা হাসিখুশি,অপ্টিমিস্টিক ছেলে থেকে ক্লিনিক্যালি ডিপ্রেসড,লাইফ্লেস বিয়িং এ পরিণত হয়েছি সামহাও।নিজের ফল্ট সারাউন্ডিংয়ের ফল্ট সবকিছুরই হাত আছে....একপাক্ষিক দোষ দিয়ে লাভ নেই।থিং ইজ ডিপ্রেশনের সাথে ডিল করতে গিয়ে একাডেমিকের অবস্থা যাচ্ছেতাই হয়ে যাচ্ছে....স্ট্যান্ডার্ড সিজি যাকে বলে সেইটা আছে বাট এভাবে চলতে থাকলে ভালোই ড্রপ খাবে এই টার্মে।রিসেন্টলি প্যারেন্টসদের সাথে মিসবিহেভ করে ফেলতেছি নিজের অজান্তেই,সিজির চিন্তা থেকেও এইটা বেশি হার্ট করতেছে।

এই অবস্থা থেকে রিকভারির জন্য কি করা যায়.... ভালো কোন সাইকোলজিস্ট সাজেস্ট করতে পারবেন কেউ?

Have a nice day in case you made it this far

~someone from 22

text:
#1829
Like many, I stay up late at night, sometimes not sleeping until sunrise. As much as I’d like to believe it’s because of late-night studying, that’s not really true, I don’t even study every night. The truth is, nighttime is the only time I feel free from pressure and expectations. In the quiet of the night, when the world finally slows down, I can be alone and just be myself, even if only for a little while. There have been days when I’ve deliberately delayed sleep, not because I wasn’t tired, but because I wasn’t ready to face the next day.

~anonymous

text:
#1827
Attachment to things is quite terrifying. I was a car freak. Things improved, and my father purchased one, but he had to sell it later because his financial situation deteriorated. Now, every time I see that model of car, I hunt for that number plate...that serial number...it haunts me like fate is cruel.
I hope that my four-year degree will allow me to buy whatever I desire in life. Life is really for the pretentious privileged people. I have a friend who said he didn't have any problems about any degree because he already runs a family business. He drives a Mercedes and a BMW. He can afford every luxury that he desires.. I am not jealous but really breaks me from inside like we are in the same age . But his priorities and mine are like so different. 

~anonymous

text:
#1821 *new*

Jara miss korsen tader jonno.
So, what was these all about?

1. #1816 (The Hurt Boyfriend) – This guy is deeply invested in his relationship and feels neglected. He makes time for his girlfriend but doesn’t feel the same effort from her. His frustration builds up to insecurities, and he even compares himself to her ex, which shows how much this situation is affecting him.

2. #1819 (The Girlfriend’s Response) – She claps back hard, defending her personal space and priorities. She points out that his expectations feel controlling and calls out his insecurity. Instead of trying to address his feelings gently, she goes into full-on attack mode, which only escalates the situation.

3. #1821 (The Boyfriend Tries to Reason) – He’s not demanding full control but just some attention. He opens up about why he acts the way he does and suggests a conversation to sort things out. He seems more willing to compromise, but his emotional state is fragile.

4. #1822 (The Breakup Moment) – He finally gives up. His patience has run out, and he declares the end of the relationship. His tone suggests that he feels defeated rather than angry.

5. #1823 (The Internet Troll Enters) – Someone jumps in with sarcasm, making fun of the whole thing. This is the typical internet response when things get too dramatic—people start trolling.

6. #1824 (The Confession & Reflection) – This person admits that they faked #1819 for entertainment, but after reading the replies, they realize the original situation was serious. Then they write a hypothetical response as if #1821 was real, adding their own thoughts on the matter.

# My Take on This Drama:

The guy in #1816 seems emotionally invested but a bit too dependent on his girlfriend for validation. His frustration is valid, but comparing himself to her ex is a mistake.

The girl in #1819 might have valid points, but her delivery is harsh. She could have reassured him instead of attacking.

#1821 was an attempt to fix things, but by then, emotions were too high.

It’s a classic case of relationship imbalance, where one person feels ignored, and the other feels suffocated.
 
So, apnarao jara future e eishob korben..shabdhane.

~anonymous

text:
#1810

I feel like dogshit. I am a grown adult with a developed body and mind, yet I still have to rely on my parents for everything.

I remember last Ramadan. I was having my first iftar in KUET when it hit me—I hadn’t earned a single khejur on my own. I had never felt so ashamed of myself. My mother has dedicated her whole life to ensuring I have a bright future, and here I am, feeling worthless, not knowing how I could ever repay her or make her happy.

I don’t like asking my parents for things. They are capable, and though they struggle a bit, they manage. I know these feelings might seem unnecessary to many because, in a few years, I’ll start earning, right? I don’t know. I feel such shame that I can’t imagine a life where I’m anything but a subject of pity.

Since when has knowing the truth kept us from feeling miserable? At times, I even feel ashamed to exist. And I hate myself because survival demands so much from a man.

~anonymous

text:
#1807
Life is a manifestation of the laws of thermodynamics, specifically entropy, the universal drift towards disorder. There used to be a flow, a rhythm, a sense of direction. But now my universe extends infinitely, creating voids in my head. The farther it extends, the more I am scattered, lost in the spaces between what was and what is.
I long for thread to guide me. What about a reference point in this magnificent chaos. But even a single thread can twist itself. Stability is a dream. 
Maybe the answer is not to fight the entropy but to go with it, to spin something whole from the disparate fragments.

~anonymous

text:
#1793
I would be grateful if you post this.  

If this post triggers you, I apologize—I don’t mean any harm.  

For as long as I can remember, the sole goal of my life was BUET. Egoistically, I also thought I would at least get BUET URP. Unfortunately, I failed badly—my name wasn’t even on the list.  

But somehow, by the Lord’s mercy, I got KUET EEE.  

I always dreamt of BUET EEE, but the Lord decided KUET EEE for me.  

All my friends are posting about studying at BUET, sharing rag wall pictures. Although I respect them, it would be a lie to say it doesn’t sting my soul. My mother constantly criticizes me (she is right—it’s my fault for failing).  

Mainly, I just wanted to ask for some advice from my KUET EEE seniors.  

Yes, I failed BUET badly. So, I can’t just relax, chill, or watch series. I feel like vomiting...  

With due respect, I want to start studying EEE course material now. After February 26, I believe I have had enough rest. Please, I beg you, don’t abhor me. I would always be grateful if any seniors could suggest some resources.  

I don’t want to lose anymore—never. At least not after five years, when all KUET and BUET students from the HSC ‘24 batch will graduate. I want to be far better than BUET’s HSC ‘24 EEE students.  

If I seem irrational, I apologize again.  

I have had my fair share of rest, and I would love to be busy now because every free moment is gradually draining all the confidence I have.  

If this post irritates you, I am sorry.

~anonymous

Hi,
I needed to get this off of my heart and I had no other but anonymously say this to you. If you're reading this gosh I have you more than I can ever put out in words. It's like you could break my heart as much as you want as long as you're willing to keep it. I know I wasn't supposed to catch no ' real feeling ' the way you call  it. But my love how do I not fall into love?. Not catch feelings for you. You changed so much of me, turned me into a whole new persons. You were and are everything I could ask for. How do I not fall prey to the greed of calling you mine. But what a shame you don't feel the same. I couldn't help but want to keep you forever. I can't get you back in my life. More like I shouldn't let you get back. My heart can't take this nonchalance. Can't help when I loved you too much and too hard.
I hope in another universe I get to call you mine. You will forever be my first love. Until then see you.

~Someone

text:
#1784
Reply to 1771,
Dear T,
জানি না, কি বলবো। আত্মবিশ্বাস এতোটা নড়বড়ে হয়ে গেছে যে, এই ARS আদৌ আমি কিনা—সেটাও সন্দেহ হয় এখন। আমি জানি না তুমি কী চাও, বা আদৌ কিছু চাও কিনা। রহস্যের ধুলো তুমি এমনভাবে উড়িয়ে দাও যে, আমি যতবার পর্দা সরাতে চাই, ততবারই দিগন্ত ঘোলা হয়ে যায়। আজকাল নিজেকেই Team Summer মনে হয়—Maybe i'm not for love..
একটা সময় ছিল, যখন হুইস্পারের প্রতিটা শব্দের ভাঁজে নিজেকে খুঁজতাম। মনে হতো, সবই আমার জন্য লেখা। আবার সন্দেহ হতো—আমি কি আদৌ এতটা মূল্যবান? কত কথা লিখতে চেয়েছি, কিন্তু "তোমাকে না লেখা ফাল্গুন" কিংবা "হুইস্পার"—কোথাও জায়গা পেল না আমার শব্দেরা। হয়তো কিছু অনুভূতি না বলাই ভালো।
 কুয়েটের ইস্যুটা খুব দরকার ছিলো। একটু হলেও ডাইভার্ট হতে পেরেছি। ভাবলাম গহীনে যাওয়ার থেকে আলোতে এসে ক্ষোভ,  রাগ কষ্টকে ভালো কোনো কাজে লাগাই। স্বপ্নটা আপাতত দেখিছিনা। গহীনের অন্ধকারে ডুবে না গিয়ে, আলোতে এসে ক্ষোভ-রাগ-কষ্টকে ভালো কিছুর জন্য কাজে লাগাই। ওয়েভ আর ফ্রিকোয়েন্সী কারোর ই মিলেনা, সহাবস্থান করে একে অপরকে পরিপূর্ণ করতে হয়। কলিশন তোহ হবেই, অমিল তোহ থাকবেই।
অপেক্ষা বইতে একটা কথা আছে, "অপেক্ষা হচ্ছে মানুষের বেঁচে থাকার টনিক।" 
তুমিই আমাকে শেখাইলা জোর করে কিছু হয়না। এডমিন সহানুভূতি না দেখাইলে হয়তো এটা ও তোমার কাছে যাবেনা।
ইতি,
ARS

text:
#1779
It's been 11 months since I last texted you—almost a year, huh? Time changes so fast. It feels like just yesterday, yet also like I’ve been missing you for lifetimes. So much has changed.

I remember those first few days when I realized you were never going to be mine. I was in denial, clinging to the hope that maybe—just maybe—something would change. Then came acceptance, though a small part of me still wished for you, knowing it was never going to happen. I consider myself a logical person, but the heart has its own ways. Looking back now, I find it silly. How foolish I was. The duality of my own heart astonishes me sometimes.

Lately, you’ve been quite active on Facebook. You look happy, my love—so happy and content. Seeing you like this brought tears to my eyes. Happy tears. Maybe that’s how life works. We don’t always get what we want, but we end up where we’re meant to be. Did you ever imagine you’d be this happy with her? Maybe we break so that our pieces can be rearranged where they truly belong.

In these 11 months, I’ve felt everything for you—disappointment, sadness, anger, unbearable rage, and love… so much love. Do you know how much my heart suffered, carrying all those contradicting feelings? You’ll never know. And you don’t need to.

I was reading a book where a girl tells a boy, 'She just wants him to remember her—to remember that she existed and that they used to walk beside each other.' That line made me think of you. That’s all my heart asks for—to be remembered by you. I dont know why it is still so much important to me to be remembered by you.To not become just another face in the crowd of your past.

Life moves forward. We grow older. We meet countless people and forget so many of them. But I can’t bear the thought of being one of the forgotten ones in your life. Do you understand that? When the nights are quiet, and my thoughts wander, I imagine us crossing paths years from now. I picture you walking past me like a stranger, not recognizing me at all. How would I stand that? I can't.

So, this is all I ask: even when time fades your memories, even when you start forgetting things—please remember, I existed.

I hope you have a long, beautiful life, filled with happiness and love with the girl that makes you the happiest.

~anonymous

text:
#1777
Update on #1722
Well, as expected, I didn’t get into BUET (ranked 1900+) XD, but honestly, I don’t feel devastated. Yeah, I did feel a bit sad seeing most of my friends updating their profiles with "Studies at BUET," but I reminded myself that this feeling will pass. Alhamdulillah, I have no regrets.
However, what I will regret is not being able to study at KUET. When I looked back at the comments on #1722, I saw all the encouraging words from seniors, and honestly, their support made it easier to accept the outcome. I don’t feel bad about not getting in, but I do feel sad knowing I won’t have the chance to meet such amazing people. I wish my merit was a little better so I could have studied here for a better subject but I believe Allah has a better plan for me.
Right now, I’ve been accepted into SUST :v most likely EEE, but I’m still unsure if I'll go there. Am hoping for IUT, as it is my second choice after BUET. Let’s see what the future holds.
Even though I’ll never study at KUET, I know I’m going to miss it. Because of the amazing seniors, great environment & obviously KUET whispers. Never thought I'll feel sad for KUET rather than BUET XD. Oh well it was because of you people. Thanks for the encouragement  :))

~Not so a broken soul.

Dear ARS,

I have come only to say this—though we no longer talk, no longer meet, no longer exist in each other’s orbit, you may think I despise you most. But in truth, I miss you more than words can bear.

Every moment we shared still lingers in the corridors of my memory, vivid and unyielding. In the world of my imagination, you remain the most luminous moon, radiant and untouchable. Whenever I gaze upon the night sky, I do not see the moon—I see you. Your smile, the one I cherished above all else, still haunts the edges of my soul. The moon’s meaning, its very essence, may change for you, but to me, it is you.

Believe me, I long to erase these memories, yet I cannot breathe without them. Your smile once stirred tempests in my heart—a storm not of ruin, but of love.

I cannot say all that remains unspoken, but I will say this—I have never stopped seeing you, never. Even now, I know every detail of your world, just as you once knew mine. I only wish you had weighed your feelings with the gravity they deserved… perhaps then, we could have been more than a story lost in time.

—Your past moon, drowned in an abyss of irredeemable , whispering echoes of a forgotten light.

~anonymous

Was I not enough for you to love? Or did she take you away? You doubted me… Look, I’m still alone, while you’re thinking about getting married.

You wanted to talk about us, but whenever I brought up her—my closest female friend—you told me to set the topic aside. And now… you…

It’s Ramadan. Do you remember last Ramadan? I used to call you for Sehri, and we had Iftar together. And now… Next year, maybe you’ll be talking to your wifey about how beautiful your Ramadan love story was with her. 

KUET has given me nothing but loneliness. In the end, all I have is myself. Maybe this isn’t the right time to say all this… But to you, it’s just a story, isn’t it? Yet… I don’t know.

Just a Story, I Guess

text:
#1752
Answer on 1749 : 
"A person can be in a relationship and still feel unloved because love is more than just being with someone—it’s about feeling truly seen, understood, and accepted"

When I wrote that line, it wasn’t about whether I have someone in my life; it was about the fear that even love has conditions. The fear that if someone knew every part of me—especially the painful parts—they might not stay. That kind of fear lingers, even in love.
Feeling unloved isn’t always about the presence or absence of a person. Sometimes, it’s about the battles within—past wounds, self-doubt, and the parts of us we think no one will ever fully embrace. And sometimes, love is there, but it doesn’t reach the places where the emptiness resides.
So, the contradiction isn’t a mistake—it’s reality. Because love and loneliness can exist in the same heart.
P.S : Thank you for asking this question

~anonymous

Slowly, I realized that he called me his best friend, but in the end, I wasn’t. He said it only to comfort me. Because for me, he was both my best friend and my lover. But I noticed that he never treated me the way he treated his old best friend.

I saw him being so kind to her, always putting in effort, always making plans with her—being with her like she was the one for him. I knew she was his first priority. But when it came to me, I saw nothing, felt nothing. I had to beg for his care and love, ask him to make an effort. And all he said was, "Eigula faltu jinish." He yelled at me. Isn't it sad?

I just wanted to be his best friend, to feel the way she did. I wanted to be a priority, not a beggar for friendship. I put my whole heart into him, into this friendship, but still, it wasn’t enough. I have nothing left in me.

Was asking for friendship too much? I’m sorry.

But let me tell you one thing, dear—

You lost me. You lost the girl who loved you the most and only wanted to be loved and prioritized.

~anonymous

text:
#1743
- So, tell me about your dream..

- My dream?

I want to live in a cozy house with big windows that protect me from the world but still let me watch it, and every morning the golden light of sun drips on the curtains and makes me feel warm inside and out..

To stare at the clouds everyday just to remind myself that everything changes and life goes on..

To wake up someday with a heart free of pain, a mind free of worries and eyes free of tears, and to write positive thoughts in my diary instead of writing sad words and depressing feelings..

I want my future home to be filled with books, flowers, plants, fairy-lights, candles and aesthetic vintage things, with my favorite melodies and music playing in the background all day long..

To make a "escape from reality" corner and run to it when things get hard, to have calm days, and quiet nights.. to own a place I can call "Home .. Sweet Home"..

To stop thinking about who left me, and forget all the painful memories to start focusing on myself, only myself..

And one day, to look at the night sky with happy eyes and see the stars shining brighter than ever, to feel that warmth in the cold days, covered by my blankets, while listening to the sound of rain..

To work in a job that suits me, to travel to all the countries I wished for my whole life, to see new places and go to many different adventures then, get back to my home and write notes about those exciting moments..

I want the air to smell like a delicate mixture of baking, vanilla and coffee, while I'm reading a book, to sit in the balcony and talk about life, movies, shows and everything with my bestfriend, the moon..

I just want the peace of having my own safe space in this world, to be exactly as I imagine.....

~Adrita Rahman

text:
#1742
Nights are long. Very long. 
The night's quiet, except the fan hanging from the celing. It's breathing. It's alive. 
Just not long enough to have the sleep I want. 
All I say to people nowadays is that I need sleep. I want sleep. Not the kind of sleep where you just switch to another universe where everything's just the same as the one I'm living in. 
I broke a vow today- a vow that was so sacred to me.
Now I'm slowly drifting towards that sleep. I just hope I don’t have to be a living and breathing creature in that sleep, too.
When will it all make sense? When will I get to be a a little less miserable? 
When's all going to end? Or is the long term pills- taking-days are going to start again?
I do not want anything from life. It's given me a lot. I just want to be a little less miserable.
Just a little less miserable. 

~misery in human form I guess

text:
#1730
Don't know what to say.....Just starting with a sorry, to that girl of *SE 
Being a shy and one woman addicted man I never thought that I would become this what I am turning now. I loved a girl for many years..we were in a good relationship. But don't know what happened we broke up
 (4-6yr latter) before our admission test. I couldn't take it, it cost me my admission to recover thinking everything will be fine....but as we know life is not that kind. So after admission I tried to call her but she changed her numbers , so me who hated smoking started to smoke. Then one day found her pictures with her BF.. well kinda shocked but as a person who is always jolly and happy who keeps the whole group in the rhythm.... tried to maintain my outer personality. It only cost a few nights and some cigarettes to find out that it is done...but that love for her keep insisting to call her..so managed her number and called her. Answer she gave me was like ""We were not even good friends"". Yess..life is hard..So recalling the dialogue of GOT I tried to die the boy and raise the men in me by destroying everything she gave except the scars . Well couldn't help thinking about her...but people around me could never guess what I was passing by...to them I was the same chill backbencher lively man... Going with the flow I told myself that I need a relationship to survive..if she can why can't I? So I texted that girl... don't know what but  talked about her or easily flattered her. But then what? I realized that I can't do it...I can never become that type of man...The guilt that I tried to use such a lovely girl only for me...became another burden..also couldn't get the courage to tell her...I am ashamed.So sorry for you...I can't do anything about it..but yes I won't text you anymore....

I decided to do so few days ago, so live was going eaxm is near ,Clock is tiking, late at night want to sleep but can't sleep suppressed upon the burden of guilt. Don't know what happened become very desperate to see my ex, so Openned an fake account and went to see her... maybe that's the biggest fault I have done in these days, Watching her hands in some random persons hand ,getting the cares I used to get , I just couldn't take it, me who is a so called 'sigma' in the outer part... started crying like a baby...the desperation to get her was tearing me apart... the millions of flashbacks with her coming towards me, can't stop it from hitting me, also recalling that all these means nothing to her... finishing the packets of cigarettes and crying from my core heart was the only thing I did. Taking as little space I need to fit myself in I folded myself just to cry deeply.....Realizing I was never this person, and what have I turned into... again the burden of guilt recalls me, Being a person always respecting women, to trying use them for my self...this degradation can't be me.... Also asking if I am the victim or I am the villain....??
Again thinking how can anyone forget a person so quickly with whom she passed her 7yrs....
Is this the meaning of being human ?Becoming social creatures....or is this her professional call for becoming doctor...

Don't know what..but I am sure of this that I can't forget her.... maybe my love is getting deeper for her....I feel yes, maybe I deserve this , I also tried to do so.... only I could tell the girl from KUET , that this isn't me and I am ashamed by looking into her eyes.... Praying to God to relief me from this burden and give the courage to hold her in my fleeings....

It's 3am and I can't sleep for the last several days, thinking all this , wanting to feel light by sharing it....

~anonymous

যারা উপরে উপরে চিনে দেখো বললো তুই এত চিল কেমনে ? ওদের বললাম চাইলেই চিল হওয়া যায়। তোমাদের অপশন। যারা আমারে আরেকটু চিনে তারা বললো কিরে কি হইছে ? একাডেমিক প্রেশার নাকি পেরা নিস না। যত এক্কেবারেই ক্লোজ তারা বলল তুমি এত্ত ডিপ্রেসড কেনো ? আমার বর্ণনা ওদের প্রশ্নের পরে তাচ্ছিল্য থেকে কম হবে না। আমি কোন স্টেটে আছি জানি না। শুধু বুঝি আমি এখন পুরোপুরি বিধ্বস্ত।

~anonymous

text:

I'm an admission candidate. I got selected for KUET. But as everyone my target was BUET all along. Although my merit in KUET is was a bit behind, I still had confidence that nah I'd crack BUET if I work hard enough. Time passed by, I cracked preli. I gained even more confidence, studied more hard. On the exam day, I was writing and hoping to crack it. I was close Only to realize I messed up. After coming from exam & checking everything I realized I'm just this close behind to ensuring a seat. When I came home I realized I could have solved this problem but ig my mind was tensed so I couldn’t. The fact that this tiny mistake could impact of me getting rejectsd from BUET is horrifying. I'd rather been happy if I attended a bad exam. But being so close yet so far? That's hell! No one deserves to experience this. I Don't know what to do. Seniors give me condolence or anything. I'm just too depressed atp. Idk what I wrote. It's 3 am in the morning & I have DU A unit exam at 11 am. Pardon my craziness.

~ A broken soul of 24

For boys who don't smoke, KUET is not the best place for you. For me personally, I've been coughing and having trouble in breathing for the last few days due to the extreme smoking of cigarettes and weeds consumed by most of my seniors, batchmates and roommates. And as I wanna cope up with them, I can handle up to the normal smoking of cigarettes and i won't be bothered. But the smell of weeds is just not my cup of tea. I get dizzy and feel like vomiting when it gets extreme around the air. Also if the air is being constantly consumed by someone, doesn't matter if they're taking it directly or not, it's gonna affect their physical and mental health, right? And to all the boro bhai, I'm not against smoking and I believe anyone who smokes has a complete right of whatever he wants to do. But it's for me that I can't see myself how i'm gonna cope up with this for the next few years of my life.... 

~just another flower boy from 2K23 batch

A person was riding on its back, holding a wooden staff of some kind. They were wearing a yellow hoodie. Suddenly, the figure turned to look at me and smiled. It was a girl—a younger version of you. text:
#1714
Dear H,

Valentine’s Day is nearby. I may say that it’s a cliche to feel sad that we won’t be going out or something. But I don’t have control on what I dream. Do you know the Palestinian poet Mahmoud Darwish? He wrote, Can I choose what I dream of… so I don’t dream of what won’t come true. He loved an Israeli girl named Rita. He loved her greatly but not greater than his homeland. Can you imagine his pain? A man reduced to grief. I only imagine his pensive eyes when he thinks of Rita. I have the same sea in my eyes when I think of you. 

I don’t believe that heartbreaks sound like glass shattering. It’s like the sound of the shiver of rain on a winter morning. It’s when a man feels he has forgotten how to breathe and afraid that his heart might forget how to beat as well. 

I have a picture of you on my desk. I am looking at it with the sea in my eyes. I have CT tomorrow. But these lightest of eyes calls me to fly with you. You are like a bird when you move. There is this poem by Farouq Jwaydeh which goes like,

“And if the devil was to ever see you, he’d kiss your eyes and repent”.

~anonymous

He loved her greatly but not greater than his homeland. Can you imagine his pain? A man reduced to grief. I only imagine his pensive eyes when he thinks of Rita. I have the same sea in my eyes when I think of you.   I don’t believe that heartbreaks sound like glass shattering. It’s like the sound of the shiver of rain on a winter morning. It’s when a man feels he has forgotten how to breathe and afraid that his heart might forget how to beat as well.   I have a picture of you on my desk. I am looking at it with the sea in my eyes. I have CT tomorrow. But these lightest of eyes calls me to fly with you. You are like a bird when you move. There is this poem by Farouq Jwaydeh which goes like,  “And if the devil was to ever see you, he’d kiss your eyes and repent”.

text:
#1706
I despise this life I am leading. I am plagued by relentless health issues—unpredictable, untimely, and unyielding. Just when I begin to feel a little better—not entirely well, but better—I find myself running again, desperate to keep moving. I fear leisure, as if stillness itself might consume me.

I was once the kind of person who would help others cross the road without a second thought. Now, even that simplest act of kindness sends me into a panic. Anxiety has become a constant companion, and with it come waves of distress that drain me to the core. I overthink, and before I know it, a panic attack takes hold. The weight of it crushes me so completely that I can no longer rise—I miss classes, I avoid everything. And then, when I finally regain a fragment of strength, I throw myself into endless tasks, trying to stay occupied, as if I am running away from my own self. But this isn’t me.

People talk about me—so many words, so many judgments. I pretend not to care, and maybe I truly don’t. But does that mean their words never sting, even in the slightest? How many people actually understand what I go through? How many even take the time to know? And if they don’t, why do they speak so carelessly?

I try to find happiness in the smallest things, to show the world that I am doing fine. I keep myself busy, constantly engaged. But does anyone know how much of it is forced? How much of it is merely an act of survival?

And the worst part—falling ill before an exam, missing it, or barely making it through in a miserable state. Do they think I choose this? Do they think I want this life? If only they knew how much I long for a healthy, normal existence.

~Anonymous

I know I am ruining another chance to do better. But cant help myself. I don't even feel the intensity of this sadness. I just feel numb,useless.

text:
#1678
Not from KUET, but there’s this boy who used to be my partner—before everything fell apart. I remember the day he left for Khulna; we had already broken up by then. But he was kind enough to let me know he was leaving. I couldn’t say much to him, but little does he know that a single text shattered me. We had to go our separate ways, but how am I supposed to accept that I won’t even catch a glimpse of him when I walk past our favorite street? Or our college? It’s not like I never wanted to reach out afterward, but he said he was fine on his own—that this place had somehow saved him. Maybe that’s what kept him sane through it all—keeping himself busy. So, I eventually stopped bothering him. But not a single day goes by when I don’t think about him or wonder how he’s doing. Sometimes, I read the writings on this page—a collection of bittersweet experiences, mostly about how exhausting this life can be. He said this place saved him, but I know how much of a family person he is, how easily homesick he gets. He struggled to adjust, but thankfully, he found some good companions here—which, honestly, was a relief to know. I just hope this place isn’t draining the life out of him.

~anonymous

text:
#1677
Six months ago, I promised myself that I would move on from you completely and never look back. But as I wrote those words, tears streamed down my face. Now, when I think about that moment, I feel nothing but sorrow for my heart.

Did I succeed in letting go? No—I failed miserably. I was determined, but my heart refused to listen. Since then, I have spent countless nights crying myself to sleep, waking up with unbearable headaches, and carrying a heaviness I can’t seem to shake. Every morning, the first thought in my mind is you; every night, you linger there still.

I’ve lost count of how many times I’ve checked your profile, knowing it would only deepen my pain, yet I can’t bring myself to stop. I feel helpless, trapped in this cycle of longing and heartbreak. I pray, hoping for the strength to let go of something that only brings me suffering.

Last night, I saw your post. I tried to be strong, to accept the reality that you were never mine to begin with. But no matter how hard I try, my heart keeps breaking over and over again.

I once read, "If you go through love and come out with your heart intact, you didn’t love properly." But I never needed to love you properly—I never needed to love you at all. And yet, here I am, carrying a wound so deep it refuses to heal.

~anonymous

text:
#1670
Dearest,

I miss you so much that it actually physically hurts at this point. What if all this endless, excruciating waiting leads us nowhere? What if the future we’re so worried about, so terrified of ruining, never even comes to pass, and all we truly have is this moment–slipping through our fingers, vanishing before we can hold it close?

Maybe that’s why Franz Kafka wrote: 
"Perhaps we don’t love unreasonably because we think we have time, or have to reckon with time. But what if we don't have time? Or what if time, as we know it, is irrelevant? Ah, if only the world were ending tomorrow. We could help each other very much."

Truth is, time is uncertain, the future never guaranteed and maybe this is all we get.

~anonymous

Crush, confessions, heartbreaks—after all these, do we still pretend that a boy and a girl can be ''just'' friends?
Really? Huh!!!
Why act so naive when reality stares us in the face? 
Oscar Wilde said, "Between a man and a woman, friendship is impossible. There is passion, enmity, worship, or love—but never mere friendship."
হুমায়ূন আহমেদ বলেছিলেন, "ছেলে আর মেয়ে বন্ধু হতে পারে, কিন্তু তারা অবশ্যই প্রেমে পড়বে। হয়তো খুবই অল্প সময়ের জন্য, অথবা ভুল সময়ে। কিংবা খুবই দেরিতে, আর না হয় সব সময়ের জন্য। তবে প্রেমে তারা পড়বেই।"
-- Fallen star
